category_sources: source_facts.description says kerl builds and installs Erlang/OTP instances; official README describes the same purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kerl; official GitHub README heading is kerl.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, usage, options, command reference, and project documentation.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify kerl as a POSIX-shell CLI for building and installing Erlang/OTP releases.
